schedule: before 6am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: Pin GitHub Actions to a 40-char commit SHA (Scorecard 'Pinned-Dependencies' requirement); Renovate refreshes the pin when a new patch lands. Manual review required — never auto-merged.
Group all dev-tooling minor/patch bumps in a single PR (TypeScript, Vitest, ESLint, Prettier, tsup, etc.).
Every app under apps/ (test-* + tailwind_v*) is a sample/verification app, NOT shipped on npm. Group their non-major bumps aggressively to keep noise down.
Major bumps for the sample apps under apps/ — often breaking framework upgrades. Manual review required.
schedule: before 6am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: The published package's runtime dependencies — keep tight, no auto-merge, surface fast.
Tailwind CSS itself is the package's reason to exist — surface every bump immediately.

Never bump tailwindcss in (a) the v3-pinned test apps (their reason to exist is v3 regression coverage) NOR (b) the package’s own peer-dep declaration (Tailwind v3 + v4 dual support is a documented value prop). v4 regression coverage already lives in apps/test-tailwind-v4/ + apps/test-vite-react/.
